approved_control.work_coverage: Covers benchmark harness trust repair, semantic tests, repaired benchmark evidence, README/report/figure evidence, final SOTA verdict, and run-local completion evidence; excludes live external services and public push/tag without human_gate approval.
approved_control.action_that_can_make_it_done: Implement the benchmark repair, run the semantic tests and repaired benchmark or controlled diagnostic matrix, update evidence-bearing docs/figures/final report, and pass final counterexample and verifier gates.

required_steps.transition: Audit existing HTTPS proxy benchmark contamination sources and classify Python proxy send timing, fixed order, small samples, and aggregation distortion.
Implement a stable proxy/origin fixture or equivalent controls so canonical results are attributable to client behavior.
Implement client ordering control plus paired aggregation and confidence/uncertainty reporting.
Persist trace attribution fields and enforce proxy send time anomaly gates before any SOTA verdict.
Run focused semantic tests covering benchmark ordering, trace parsing, anomaly gates, paired stats, and figure data semantics.
Run or import repaired benchmark evidence and compare it with old gen005 evidence including the 0.890x cell.
Update README/report/figure evidence chain and decide preserve, downgrade, or withdraw SOTA under repaired evidence.
Run final independent Counterexample Gate and enforce human gates for claim-changing push/tag/live/external actions.

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Audit existing HTTPS proxy benchmark contamination sources and classify Python proxy send timing, fixed order, small samples, and aggregation distortion.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Not yet produced in this controlled runtime; pregoal only defines the approved work chain.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Modify benchmark harness, tests, evidence artifacts, README/report, or final report as required by this step; then run the smallest relevant tests or benchmark diagnostics.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The allowed write paths are the repository places that carry the benchmark harness, tests, generated results, figures, README/report text, and run-local evidence.
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: Stop and append a progress event explaining the unavailable capability, failed command, or human_gate needed; do not mark the step complete.
